name: Power Junction
description: A grey metal enclosure bolted to the bulkhead. Enso VeilTech stampings on the cover plate. Houses the main reactor circuit breakers for the ship.

name: Power Junction
description: A grey metal enclosure bolted to the bulkhead. Enso VeilTech stampings on the cover plate. Houses the sub-circuit breakers for the main corridor section.

name: Power Junction
description: A grey metal enclosure bolted to the bulkhead. Enso VeilTech stampings on the cover plate. Houses the sub-circuit breakers for the cargo section.

name: Power Junction
description: A grey metal enclosure bolted to the bulkhead. Enso VeilTech stampings on the cover plate. Houses the sub-circuit breakers for the recreation section.

name: Power Junction
description: A grey metal enclosure bolted to the bulkhead. Enso VeilTech stampings on the cover plate. Houses the propulsion reactor circuit breakers.
